title: 如何在Chrome扩展中使用Transformers.js
title_en: How to Use Transformers.js in a Chrome Extension
summary: 本文介绍了如何在Chrome扩展中集成Transformers.js，实现在浏览器端直接运行机器学习模型（如文本分类、翻译等），无需服务器。通过具体示例展示了从模型加载到推理的完整流程，并讨论了性能优化和扩展开发的最佳实践。This article explains how to integrate Transformers.js into a Chrome extension to run ML models (e.g., text classification, translation) directly in the browser without a server. It demonstrates the full pipeline from model loading to inference with concrete examples, and discusses performance optimization and best practices for extension development.
